name: Bubli Mock-Faithful Asset Pack
purpose: PNG assets that preserve the original Bubli reference mockup's airy liquid-glass, prism, and soap-bubble material. Use this pack before the cleaner v2 pack when visual fidelity matters.

mockSections.usage: Visual comparison references. Use to match lightness, haze, prism depth, and UI density; do not treat these as production component backgrounds.

textures.usage: Raster prism and atmosphere textures for design boards, Tauri widget previews, and desktop floating scenes. Do not use as normal /app route backgrounds.

surfaces.usage: Glass card and panel material references with soft blur, white haze, and rim light.

bubbles.usage: Functional Bubble UI units only. Use as AgentBubble, DockOrb, BubbleMark, badge, notification, or ghost signal. Avoid large decorative wallpaper bubbles in /app routes.

widgets.usage: Widget, dock, status-ring, timer, and small chart references that should keep the original mockup's soft glass material.

hardRules: Use this pack first when matching the original mockup.
Do not replace these raster textures with CSS-only circles, gradients, or SVG-like flat shapes for fidelity-critical work.
Use source/mock-section-* as visual references for lightness, haze, and material, not as literal UI components.
Do not use large texture backgrounds as normal member-web-app route backgrounds.
Keep bubbles small and functional: AgentBubble, DockOrb, BubbleMark, badge, notification, ghost signal.
Keep face orbs subtle at 64-96px; high-contrast facial details look uncanny.
